request.details: Refill for Lisinopril 10 milligrams, once daily with food

requests.details: Refill for Lisinopril 10 milligrams, once daily with food

transcript: Hi, this is Maria Gonzalez, date of birth March 12, 1978. I am calling to request a refill for my Lisinopril 10 milligrams, once daily with food. My insurance is Blue Cross PPO and my number is 415-555-0101. Thank you.
